issue_title: [BUG] type on .md files return an empty string in chrome for hover events
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
Last year a bug was fixed, for uploading markdown files, where the type field was empty.
[Bug from last year](https://github.com/react-dropzone/react-dropzone/issues/1368)

I am using the mantine-dropzone lib, which is using the react-dropzone. When hovering a .md file above the
test_description_zh: 在 Chrome 浏览器中，将一个 .md（Markdown）文件拖拽悬停到 react-dropzone 放置区域上方，观察放置区域的状态变化（例如是否正确识别文件类型、是否触发悬停样式和接受/拒绝反馈）。
expected_result_zh: 当 .md 文件悬停在放置区域上方时，Dropzone 应能正确识别该文件的 MIME 类型（text/markdown），悬停状态应正常触发（如高亮、边框变化等），文件不应因为类型为空字符串而被错误拒绝。
